findings.finding: Task 4's verification gate checks only that 'title_phrase_ambiguous.stderr' and '32 matches' are absent from the README; it never asserts the 'numeric_unambiguous.stdout' redirect was removed from the recapture recipe. A maintainer can pass both greps while leaving the numeric stdout-snapshot resurrection vector intact.
findings.reviewer_angle: Parity-contract erosion and the half-quintuple fixture state
findings.evidence_quote: grep -c 'title_phrase_ambiguous.stderr' tests/fixtures/cortex-resolve-backlog-item/README.md == 0 (the recapture command for that snapshot is removed) — pass if both counts are 0.
